assignments.track_rule_applied: OWASP A03 Injection / A07 XSS — Editor-role plants SVG with bypass of insufficient server-side filter; any viewer's session is compromised on render.
assignments.secondary_escalation_note: Admin-session hijack possible if an admin views the malicious media. Not promoted to privilege escalation/RCE track unless a probe confirms admin session takeover end-to-end.
